design_philosophy: Grounded, tactile, and stress-reducing. A zero-based budgeting app that avoids sterile 'fintech' tropes. Uses earthy tones to make money management feel natural and calm.

fab.style: absolute bottom-6 right-6 w-14 h-14 bg-[#232B25] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg z-50

bottom_nav.style: bg-white/90 border-t border-[#E5E0D8] pb-8 pt-4 px-6 flex justify-between items-center

alerts.negative_balance: bg-[#C26D5C]/10 border border-[#C26D5C]/30 text-[#C26D5C] p-4 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-3

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid crisp borders on all cards to ground them.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Very subtle, diffuse ambient shadows. No harsh drop shadows.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast_ratio: All text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards against backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='fab-add-expense').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use NativeWind or StyleSheet in React Native Expo to apply these guidelines.
Build a card-based dashboard using the Bento grid approach for mobile.
Ensure the progress bars clearly show the zero-based budget (Allocated vs Spent) with thick height (h-4).
Implement a clear visual warning state (using #C26D5C / Terracotta) when an account balance + scheduled CC transfer goes negative.
Credit Cards should use the specified colors (Amex: Slate Blue, MC: Burnt Orange, Visa: Deep Navy).
Implement the FAB for quick expense entry on the main screens.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid for testing.
